task_description: Implement architecture improvements for the zhushi.liuyao project: add package management (pyproject.toml), independent unit tests for core modules, GitHub Actions CI, move documentation to docs/, add TypedDict annotations, and create custom exception hierarchy.

verification.summary: pip install -e '.[test]' succeeds. All 463 tests pass (347 original + 116 new). Tests exercise real module logic with domain-specific assertions, not just mocks.
